description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a long, slender barrel and a wooden full stock. The stock and fore-end are made of polished wood with a rich brown finish, showing subtle grain patterns. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving a matte black appearance with minimal reflective qualities. A prominent lever loop is located beneath the receiver, indicating the action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and integrated with the lever, providing a smooth transition and ergonomic grip. The overall design is streamlined, with no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel, and the shotgun appears robust and well-crafted for practical use.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long black barrel, polished wooden stock, and a rounded trigger guard integrated with the lever. The design is classic and streamlined, featuring dark metal and rich brown wood.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, long black barrel, and the lever-action mechanism beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and fore-end, with minimal visible detail except the circular muzzle and slim wooden fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again showing the wooden stock, long barrel, and lever-action mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the slim profile of the shotgun, with the lever and trigger guard barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized trigger guard integrated with the lever, smooth and continuous with no finger grooves or reinforcement
